meaning: 百代唱片公司 [军] Electro Magnetic Interference,电磁干扰
examples: EMI certainly needs to do something.
EMI clearly thinks this is a good deal.
The accident-prone EMI has done better.
Last week, EMI's UK chief executive Tony Wadsworth left the company after 25 years.
Danger Mouse says he can't release the album because of an unspecified dispute with EMI Records.
